name: mcp-toolz
description: Claude Code plugins from the mcp-toolz developer toolkit.

plugins.name: precommit-detect
plugins.description: Detects whether a repo's pre-commit setup is wired up and walks you through approval-gated installs.

plugins.name: revise-all-docs
plugins.description: Updates CLAUDE.md, README.md, and docs/**/*.md with session learnings.

plugins.name: resolve-github-alerts
plugins.description: Resolves GitHub security alerts (Dependabot, code scanning, secret scanning) and opens PRs for review.

plugins.name: mcp-toolz-server
plugins.description: One-step install of the mcp-toolz MCP server in Claude Code (auto-registers ask_chatgpt / ask_claude / ask_gemini / ask_deepseek tools).
